prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic black-and-white portrait of the man in a formal black suit and tie, captured in a dark minimalist studio. The subject is slightly off-center, facing forward with a calm, serious expression and soft eye focus. Dramatic low-key lighting with a strong overhead/back light creates a glowing rim light around hair and silhouette, while the face fades into deep shadow. High contrast with smooth falloff into darkness builds a moody atmosphere. Apply heavy film grain and high ISO noise (3200–6400) for a raw analog feel. Add slight softness, subtle blur, and faint highlight bloom. Natural skin texture with visible pores. Monochrome grading with crushed blacks, soft highlights, and shallow depth of field (50mm, f/1.8).
promptEn: Ultra-realistic cinematic black-and-white portrait of the man in a formal black suit and tie, captured in a dark minimalist studio. The subject is slightly off-center, facing forward with a calm, serious expression and soft eye focus. Dramatic low-key lighting with a strong overhead/back light creates a glowing rim light around hair and silhouette, while the face fades into deep shadow. High contrast with smooth falloff into darkness builds a moody atmosphere. Apply heavy film grain and high ISO noise (3200–6400) for a raw analog feel. Add slight softness, subtle blur, and faint highlight bloom. Natural skin texture with visible pores. Monochrome grading with crushed blacks, soft highlights, and shallow depth of field (50mm, f/1.8).
promptZh: 超写实电影感黑白肖像，主体为 男士，身着 正式黑色西装配领带，拍摄于 极简暗调影棚。主体略微偏离中心，正对镜头，表情冷静严肃，眼神聚焦柔和。戏剧性的低调照明配合强烈的头顶/背部光源，在发丝和轮廓边缘勾勒出明亮的光晕，面部则隐入深邃阴影中。高对比度与平滑的暗部过渡营造出浓郁的情绪氛围。应用厚重的胶片颗粒和高 ISO 噪点（3200–6400）以呈现原始的胶片质感。添加轻微的柔焦、细腻的模糊效果以及淡淡的高光溢出。展现带有可见毛孔的自然皮肤纹理。黑白调色，压低暗部，柔化高光，并采用浅景深效果（50mm，f/1.8）。
